    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n 1 year ago\r\n
    \r\n  \r\n \r\n Reply\r\n Report\r\n \r\n Sign in or join us to rate comments! \r\n Sign In || Join Us\r\n \r\n

    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n [ - ]\r\n MEHJones\r\n - member since 02-Nov-16\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n

    If Tottenham are aiming to finish in the top six, this is one of those games they need to be winning. Tottenham generally have a good record against Everton and Everton have a lot of injuries. Nevertheless, I don't think Tottenham will make it easy for themselves. Even if Richarlison scores against his old club, Tottenham might need Bergvall to win a penalty for Son to convert. Tottenham 2-1 Everton
